failure.error_msg: ALU produced 11111111111111111111111111110111 instead of -9 assert LogicArray('11111111111111111111111111110111', Range(31, 'downto', 0)) == -9 + where LogicArray('11111111111111111111111111110111', Range(31, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(alu.result).value + where LogicArrayObject(alu.result) = HierarchyObject(alu).result
